name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer service offering domestic and international wire transfers, bill payments, and cash access through a network of retail locations and partner merchants.
description_long:
MoneyGram is a global money transfer company that operates through a distributed network of physical locations rather than as a standalone storefront. The company partners with established retailers and specialized check-cashing outlets to provide financial services to consumers. Founded on the principle of making money transfers accessible, MoneyGram has positioned itself as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for unbanked and underbanked populations.

The company's service portfolio includes domestic and international money transfers, bill payment services, money orders, check cashing, and wire transfers. Customers can initiate transactions online through MoneyGram's website or visit partner locations in their area to conduct transfers in person. The Sacramento location listing shows MoneyGram operates through partnerships with major retailers like Walmart and Save Mart, as well as specialized financial service providers like Ace Cash Express and local money transfer agents.

MoneyGram distinguishes itself through its hybrid delivery model, combining online convenience with physical locations for customers who prefer face-to-face transactions. The company operates 28 locations across Sacramento alone, providing extensive geographic coverage. Their partnership strategy allows them to reach customers through trusted, familiar retail environments rather than requiring dedicated branch visits.

A significant consideration is that MoneyGram functions primarily as a money transfer and bill payment service rather than a full-service financial institution. Customers should understand that using MoneyGram typically involves transaction fees, and international transfers may include currency conversion rates. The service is most beneficial for individuals needing occasional transfers rather than regular banking relationships, and rates and fees vary by transaction type and destination.
pros: Extensive network of 28 locations in Sacramento across multiple partner retailers including Walmart, Save Mart, and Ace Cash Express
Flexible service options with both online and in-person transaction capabilities
Extended hours at many locations, with some partners open until 11:59 PM
Partnership model provides access through trusted, familiar retail environments
Multiple service types available at single locations (transfers, bill pay, check cashing)
Convenient geographic distribution across different neighborhoods in Sacramento
cons: Transaction fees apply to money transfers, reducing the amount received by recipients
International transfers subject to currency conversion rates and additional markups
Service dependent on partner location availability and hours rather than dedicated MoneyGram branches
No indication of competitive pricing compared to other money transfer services
Limited financial products beyond basic money transfer and bill payment services
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing occasional domestic money transfers
Immigrants sending money to family members internationally
Individuals seeking bill payment services outside traditional banking hours
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers needing convenient, accessible money transfer and bill payment services without a traditional bank account. The primary caveat is that all services carry transaction fees that reduce the net amount transferred, and customers should compare rates across providers before using the service.
